description:
Advances: mutagen.mutators

Deliverable:
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators.ex` (module `MutagenEx.Mutators`) â€” registry that
  enumerates the 10 mutators below.
- Per-mutator modules under `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/`:
  `arith.ex`, `compare.ex`, `boolean.ex`, `literal.ex`, `with_swap.ex`,
  `case_drop.ex`, `pipeline.ex`, `result_tuple.ex`, `else_removal.ex`,
  `guard_drop.ex`. Each module defines `match?/1`, `mutate/1`, `validate/1`.
- Content-addressed site ID format: `{relative_file}:{ast_hash}:{mutator_name}`
  where `ast_hash` is `:erlang.phash2/2` of the normalized AST node (strip
  `:line`, `:column`, `:end_line`, `:end_column` from metadata before
  hashing). Per [mutagen.decision.content_addressed_ids](.spec/decisions/content_addressed_ids.md).
- Per-mutator unit tests at `test/mutagen_ex/mutators/<mutator>_test.exs`
  (one per mutator).
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutators_test.exs` for the registry.
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutators_property_test.exs` covering symmetric-swap
  invariants and round-trip `Macro.to_string/1` â†’ `Code.string_to_quoted/2`.
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutators/id_stability_test.exs` â€” golden test asserting
  byte-identical IDs across 10 invocations on the same source.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutators_test.exs`,
  `mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutators_property_test.exs`,
  `mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutators/`.
- Covers spec-verification stubs `mutagen.mutators.v1`, `.v2`, `.v3`, `.v4`.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenarios `mutagen.mutators.s1` through `s6`.

Out of Scope (files):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex` (S4b â€” consumes the catalog)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex` (S5)
- Anything outside the mutators/ subtree

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/*.ex`
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutators_test.exs`
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutators_property_test.exs`
- `test/mutagen_ex/mutators/*.exs`

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not run any mutated code. The catalog is pure AST manipulation; runtime
  classification (`:killed`, `:survived`, `:timeout`, `:compile_error`, `:error`)
  is the runner's job in S5.
- Do not add third-party deps. `StreamData` is the only acceptable test-only
  dep; check whether it's already in `mix.exs` before adding.
- Do not introduce mutator config (catalog is closed in v1 per
  [mutagen.decision.validate_predicates](.spec/decisions/validate_predicates.md)).

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly with `--warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] All mutator unit tests + property tests + ID stability test pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (`mutagen.mutators.v1`-`.v4`)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S4a: Mutator catalog + validate predicates
